chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 12 of 2013 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case For hearing of main case 05-10-2021 Mr. Faheem Majeed Memon, Associate of Mr. Fayyaz Ahmed A. Soomro, Advocate for the petitioner. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Akhtar, Advocate for respondent No.3. Mr. Muhammad Hamzo Buriro, Deputy Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Through this petition, the petitioner had sought appointment in Pakistan Railways and the only impediment was in respect of some age relaxation. The petitioner was 33 years of age when this petition was filed, and for one reason or the other, since 2013 this has not been decided. As of today, even if the maximum relaxation in age is granted, the petitioner would still be disqualified. In these circumstances, this petition has become infructuous and is accordingly dismissed. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
